title: Comfortable (Bare Bones x Comforts)
description: Offers compatibility between the Comforts mod and the bare bones resource pack.
body:
## Bare Bones style for hammocks and sleeping bags is here!!!
### What it does?
This resource pack retextures  the entire collection of the comforts mod items to fit in the Bare Bones resource pack style.

![Bareboniefied Comforts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l57yGo6R/images/54bca3ffd349b9250e9dc8f6f35304b4c626594f.png)
 **Credits:** 
- [Comforts Mod by TheIIlusiveC4](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts)
- [Bare Bones Resource Pack by RobotPants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)
